sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18102" key="a)fairete/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφαιρ-ετέω</orth>, <sense id="n18102.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pick off,</tr_> Ion Hist.I.</sense> </entryFree>
